features.name: Usage Analysis App
features.description: The main admin application that provides a unified dashboard for platform telemetry, covering events, users, packages, functions, and errors across configurable time ranges.

features.name: User & Session Analytics
features.description: Tracks unique users, new users, sessions, and per-user event breakdowns, providing aggregate counts, ranked lists, and group-level overviews of platform actors.

features.name: Error Tracking & User Reports
features.description: Surfaces and ranks platform errors by frequency, source, and package, and powers the Reports app where users can file, browse, and manage error reports with optional Jira ticket creation.

members.name: Create JIRA ticket
members.description: Creates JIRA ticket using current error log

features.name: Function Call Analytics
features.description: Measures how often each registered function is called, by whom, from which source, and how long it takes to execute, powering the Functions tab of the main analytics view.

features.name: Package Analytics
features.description: Shows which packages are most used and by whom, when they were installed, and provides a context-pane drilldown with function, log, and audit sub-views per package.

features.name: Data Source & Query Analytics
features.description: Ranks connections, data sources, and SQL queries by usage frequency and identifies which users and functions rely on each data source.

features.name: Test Track & Quality Dashboards
features.description: Tracks automated and manual test results across builds, compares benchmark performance between versions, and provides the Test Track admin app to browse and manage test cases.

features.name: Service Log Viewer
features.description: Streams and summarises server-side service logs — actions, errors, sessions, and parameter values — through the Service Logs admin app with real-time tail support.

features.name: Click Tracking
features.description: Records and visualises UI element click events across the platform, enabling admins to inspect which interface elements receive the most interaction.

features.name: Project Analytics
features.description: Tracks how often projects are accessed and by how many unique users, broken down by day and period, powering the Projects tab introduced in v2.5.0.

features.name: DB Infrastructure Diagnostics
features.description: Exposes internal PostgreSQL statistics (pg_stat_statements, table sizes, schema columns) for database-level performance monitoring by platform administrators.
